channel.title: A Wonderful Life
channel.description: Data, life, and the space between. Essays by Vijay Panangipally.

item.title: Built With AI, Here to Stay
item.description: Building trackyourapp.ca with AI assistance, incidents included, made the case that software deserves judgment on its merits, not its method.

item.title: India and Pakistan: Twin Dreams Divided, Bound by Hope
item.description: In August 1947, the British Empire partitioned South Asia into India and Pakistan, resulting in the displacement of 15 million people and over a million deaths.
